title: Administration

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: System settings and Docker resource cleanup
settings.diskUsageDescription: Reclaimable space used by Docker images, containers, volumes and build cache
settings.confirmClean: This will permanently remove: {target}. This action cannot be undone. Continue?
settings.confirmCleanAll: This will permanently remove all unused images, stopped containers, unused volumes and the build cache. This action cannot be undone. Continue?
settings.scheduleDescription: Automatically run a Docker cleanup every day at the configured time
settings.scheduleEnabledDescription: When enabled, the selected cleanups run daily at the chosen hour
settings.scheduledHourDescription: Hour of day (UTC) when the cleanup runs
settings.cleanupTargetsDescription: Choose which resources the scheduled cleanup removes
settings.domainDescription: Switch this Nexploy instance between a real domain (HTTPS via Let's Encrypt) and this server's IP address (plain HTTP)
settings.domainModeDescription: Turn off to access this instance over plain HTTP via its IP address instead
settings.domainWarning: Saving restarts Nexploy and the reverse proxy — this takes a few seconds and briefly interrupts access.
settings.domainRestarting: Nexploy is restarting with the new domain settings — this takes a few seconds. Reload the page shortly.
settings.upgradeDescription: Check for updates and upgrade Nexploy to the latest version
settings.upgradeWarning: Upgrading restarts Nexploy and its Docker management API — this takes a few seconds and briefly interrupts access.
settings.upgradeRestarting: Nexploy is upgrading — this takes a few seconds. Reload the page shortly.
settings.upgradeActiveBuildsWarning: The following builds are currently running and will be cancelled if you upgrade now:

manageUsersDescription: Manage user accounts and their permissions
confirmDeleteUser: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
confirmBanUser: Are you sure you want to ban {name}? They will no longer be able to access the platform.
confirmUnbanUser: Are you sure you want to unban {name}?

roleDescriptions.guest: Read-only access: repositories, builds, Docker resources and monitoring. No modifications and no access to secrets.
roleDescriptions.developer: Day-to-day deployment work: manage repositories, builds, deployments, environment variables, pipelines, domains, SSL certificates and Docker resources. No integration or user management.
roleDescriptions.admin: Full access: everything a Developer can do, plus management of integrations (Git, registries, Cloudflare, Bucket Storage), Swarm infrastructure, Traefik, cleanup, AI and users.

name: Name
noVolumesAvailableDescription: Create a volume to start configuring backups
noBucketStorageAccounts: No bucket storage accounts configured. Add one in Integrations.

ssl.title: SSL Certificates
ssl.description: Manage SSL/TLS certificates for your domains

registry.title: Docker Registries
registry.description: Manage Docker registries used to push images
registry.addDescription: Configure a Docker registry to push images
registry.urlDescription: The hostname of the registry (e.g. registry-1.docker.io, ghcr.io, registry.gitlab.com)
registry.passwordCreateHint: Leave empty if no authentication is required
registry.passwordEditPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep current password
registry.passwordEditHint: Leave empty to keep the existing password
registry.noRegistries: No registries configured. Add one to push images during builds.
registry.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the registry {name}? This action cannot be undone.
registry.mirrorDescription: Pull an image from any registry and push it to a configured registry

errors.cannotChangeOwnRole: You cannot change your own role
errors.cannotDeleteOwnAccount: You cannot delete your own account
errors.cannotModifyAnotherAdmin: Only the admin who promoted this user can change their role, ban, or delete them

traefik.title: Traefik Configuration
traefik.description: Edit Traefik reverse proxy configuration files
traefik.selectFile: Select a file to start editing
traefik.newFileDescription: The file will be created in the Traefik service directory and picked up automatically.
traefik.invalidFilenameHint: Only letters, numbers, hyphens and dots are allowed
traefik.fileAlreadyExists: A file with this name already exists
traefik.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
traefik.unsavedChangesDescription: You have unsaved changes. If you switch files, your changes will be lost.
